Title: http_map_table
Feature: http_map_table(logical_path, physical_path, vhost, listen_host, stored_in_dav, is_browseable, default_page, security_restriction, authentication, auth_function, postprocess_function, execute_vsp_as, execute_soap_as, have_persistent_session_variables, soap_options, auth_options)
Description: This function inserts an entry defining a virtual directory into the HTTP maps table.
Examples:
http_map_table ('/soapapp', '/soapapp/', 'www.foo.com', 'host.foo.com', NULL,
                 NULL, NULL, 'SSL', 'SOAP_APP', 'mysoapapp_auth_hook', 'mysoapapp_post_processor',
                 NULL, 'mysoapapp_user', 1, vector ('NameSpace', 'http://example.com/soap/v11/',
                                                  'ServiceName','soapApp'));
